'''yadhoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyknodysostosis|pyknodysostosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyknodysostosis|pyknodysostosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yadhoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædheseth|yædheseth]] || [[word:yædhesej|yædhesej]] || [[word:yædhesesh|yædhesesh]] || [[word:yædhese|yædhese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadhodhosoth|yadhodhosoth]] || [[word:yadhodhosoj|yadhodhosoj]] || [[word:yadhodhososh|yadhodhososh]] || [[word:yadhodhoso|yadhodhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadhosoth|yadhosoth]] || [[word:yadhosoj|yadhosoj]] || [[word:yadhososh|yadhososh]] || [[word:yadhoso|yadhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadhofsoth|yadhofsoth]] || [[word:yadhofsoj|yadhofsoj]] || [[word:yadhofsosh|yadhofsosh]] || [[word:yadhofsof|yadhofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yadhosotho|yadhosotho]] || [[word:yadhosojo|yadhosojo]] || [[word:yadhososho|yadhososho]] || [[word:yadhosoko|yadhosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yadhosoth|yadhosoth]] || [[word:yadhosoj|yadhosoj]] || [[word:yadhososh|yadhososh]] || [[word:yadhoso|yadhoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yadhosothol|yadhosothol]] || [[word:yadhosojol|yadhosojol]] || [[word:yadhososhol|yadhososhol]] || [[word:yadhosokol|yadhosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yadhosothotho|yadhosothotho]] || [[word:yadhosojojo|yadhosojojo]] || [[word:yadhososhosho|yadhososhosho]] || [[word:yadhosoko|yadhosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yadhosothon|yadhosothon]] || [[word:yadhosojon|yadhosojon]] || [[word:yadhososhon|yadhososhon]] || [[word:yadhosokon|yadhosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yadhosothoro|yadhosothoro]] || [[word:yadhosojoro|yadhosojoro]] || [[word:yadhososhoro|yadhososhoro]] || [[word:yadhosokoro|yadhosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
